title: reden-mev
description: Reden-mev Mod connects Minecraft players to the Minecraft Engineers Vault (Minemev) directly in-game.
body:
# Reden-mev Mod – Your Technical Minecraft Workshop
![Reden-MEV Mod Banner](https://i.imgur.com/AcHCZ7O.png)

press **F6** to open the GUI and start searching!!

The **Reden-MEV** mod integrates the best of the [Minecraft Engineers Vault (Minemev)](https://www.minemev.com/) directly into your Minecraft experience! Built for technical Minecraft players (TMC) and redstone engineers, this mod allows you to access, browse, and download advanced redstone farms, mechanisms, and technical builds from the MEV community—all without leaving the game.

With **Reden-MEV**, you can also automatically download world downloads alongside schematics, making it even easier to integrate complex builds and redstone contraptions into your own worlds.

A collaboration between [Reden](https://redenmc.com) and Minemev, this mod streamlines the process of finding and implementing complex builds. With just a few clicks, you can download schematics or full world downloads, integrate them into your world, and elevate your redstone creations.

Think of it as your personal technical workshop within Minecraft, providing easy access to expert-level designs and cutting-edge redstone solutions.
Think of it as your personal technical workshop within Minecraft, providing easy access to expert-level designs and cutting-edge redstone solutions.



## Useful Links:
- [Minemev Website](https://minemev.com)
- [Minemev Discord](https://discord.gg/qx2rHk6TtV)
